reviews.review_title: Would like to play on quest 3
reviews.review_description:
It's a shame that this game has to be repurchased to play on the next generation device (quest 3) ... Should come complimentary to those who have previously purchased this same game...
It was a fun app until now; I will not be purchasing an additional copy of Mondly for each system..

This is very much a first impressions review. I really think this has potential. My biggest gripe right now is that right-to-left languages such as Arabic and Hebrew have their text scrambled so everything is backwards (and the Arabic script isn't connected). *Please fix this soon!* I see this as a great learning environment for kids and adults alike. I think it will be particularly beneficial for maintaining proficiency in a language you are no longer actively studying. It is also great for shy people (since speaking is the key to fluency even very skilled shy people may struggle to gain fluency).

developer_response.body:
Thanks for the feedback. Problem fixed. Please give it another try and let us know how it works for you.
Alex

reviews.review_description: The Hebrew is backwards it should be read right to left not left to right.  שלום לו םולש

developer_response.body:
Hello,

thank you for the feedback. We have good news- this issue has been sorted. Please check us out and let us know what you think. Ioana, Customer Care

reviews.review_description: I was very excited to use this and learn another language but it just doesn't work so you end up being really frustrated,  please refund me

developer_response.body:
Hello, thank you for the feedback. 
What happened that did not work? 
Please let us know about it so we can make it better and get in touch at support@mondly.com. 
Looking forward to hearing from you, Ioana, Customer Care

reviews.review_description:
This app is amazing! All it is missing is more content (though what is available is enough to learn a lot). A LOT more vocabulary words would be helpful (the vocab lessons didn't seem much different from level to level). The conversation is the star of this app! More conversation suggestions (and responses) and scenes would be great! Maybe an option to pick  how you would respond in your native language,  and then a couple of different ways to say that in the new language?
As I said, more of everything! Fun fact: I use this app more than my game apps, it's that much fun!

developer_response.body: Hello, thank you very much for your kind words, we are thrilled that you enjoyed the experience! Stay tuned, more updates coming soon. All the best from the Mondly Team!

reviews.review_description: It’s got basic conversations and vocabulary. For the price it’s worth it. I’d definitely like to see more features in future. Maybe games. It’d also be good to be able to playback the recording of your voice before submitting it to see how good the accent is.

developer_response.body: Hi, thank you for your feedback - we have accounted for it. The Mondly VR app is continuously improving and we rely on your feedback when it comes to future updates. Thank you again for your support and all the best from the Mondly Team!

reviews.review_description: Love the learning experience if this game. I bought this for the go, why is it not oculus quest?
It says includes (among other languages) farsi. Where?

developer_response.body:
Hi, we're really sorry; the Farsi language database is being reviewed at the moment and it will be available by the end of the summer. In the meantime, we've removed it from our list of languages to avoid any future misunderstandings.

Ioana, Customer Care

reviews.review_description: I've enjoyed my time using and learning with this app

The graphics are really good and I'm enjoying the different environments. It's much more interesting and enjoyable than just repeating words on a screen. I'm glad I tried this app. I definitely will be using it on a regular basis.

I speak pretty good French, or so my Québécoise girlfriend says. This app could not get a single word I said, often mistaking "Quel est votre nom?" to "Vous allez trés mama" and other such examples. This is such a scam.

developer_response.body:
Hello Phill,
Thank you for the feedback. Have you tried the app in English just to test your theory? Speech recognition technology is not perfect but I assure you this works very well.
Looking forward to your feedback.
Alex from Mondly

reviews.review_description: I enjoy this app but I’d like it more if the user could control it better

I have the iOS version so I had high expectations of this app. The concept and graphics are good, but the speech recognition is not good compared to speech recognition in the same language on iOS. Also the microphone icon has a tendency to disappear when you try to aim the pointer at it to talk. I’m looking forward to upgrades.

developer_response.body:
Hi, thanks for the feedback. 
We've fixed the microphone issue and speech recognition works flawlessly. 
Please give it another try and let us know how it works for you.
Alex

reviews.review_description: Uh... mine never downloaded.  I just have a white screen when I try and open it.  Can I get some help, please?  Would much rather have the app than a refund.

developer_response.body:
Hello,

Thank you for your feedback. The issue is now fixed, please delete and re-install the app. If you encounter any issues along the way, send us an email at support@mondly.com and we’ll get back to you right away.

All the best,
Ioana, Customer Care

reviews.review_description: I thought i would be learning a new language by being introduced with english help but turns out you need to know the language you pick before you start. It seems like its more of a lesson in learning to speak well in that chosen language.

developer_response.body:
Hello Josh,

Thanks for the review. 
Sorry you could not enjoy the experience. Indeed the app is more suitable for intermediate learners. However we made sure beginners can complete the assignments too:
1. Every single word or phrase is accompanied by the English translation
2. Every sentence is spoken live by a native speaker so you can easily reproduce (speak) what you hear. 
In this way you will learn by doing, which is a great way to acquire knowledge.

We hope you'll give it another chance.

Best,
Alex from Mondly

reviews.review_title: Would be 5 if multi player worked
reviews.review_description:
Wow I was surprised at how practical this is especially for travels. It gives you a virtual image training.
I was disappointed the multi player mode is not working. Or is it just no body is every present? If multi player worked properly this app would be 5 starts.
Also it would be nice to have more situations added

developer_response.body: Hello, thank you very much for your review. In the multiplayer experience, we match learners by the language they want to learn, so it is possible that no one was trying to join with the same language as yours at that specific moment. All the best from the Mondly Team!

reviews.review_description: Downloaded it because it was free. Happy I didn’t pay $5 for it. It’s not even good for free. Needs a lot of work.

developer_response.body:
Hello, 
Thanks for the feedback. 
Would you be able to share what didn't work?
There are many devices on the market and we're working hard to optimise the experience for each one. It would help knowing what device you're using. This will help us improve the experience. 
Looking forward to your reply.
Alex from Mondly

reviews.review_description: Very very basic but great to be introduced to new languages in situations you would normally have. Good start and look forward to more advanced classes on this app for sure.
It doesn't recognize alternative answers. The concept is great but it still lacks of 3d virtual reality experience.

developer_response.body:
Hi,
Thanks for the feedback.
3D graphics added. 
Cheers!
Alex

reviews.review_title: Just Purchased, Doesnt work on the S8
reviews.review_description: Downloaded and installed the app/game. Boots to a white screen and the phone must be removed in order to restart. Latest version of Android from Samsung and a fresh install has been completed. Wasted money it appears.

developer_response.body:
Hello,

Thank you for your feedback. The issue is now fixed, please delete and re-install the app. If you encounter any issues along the way, send us an email at support@mondly.com and we’ll get back to you right away.

All the best,
Ioana, Customer Care
